status.text: Plugin %1%: Stack Element Plugin Operation '%2%' is not supported
Help generator will crash if only one status defined in the message XML file
IMMonitor error %1%
Stacking Operation Not Allowed: %1%

Plugin of type '%1%' does not support card type '%2%' on the target port '%3%'.
The plugin Supports the following card types:
%4%

Application does not support card type '%2%' for plugin '%1%' on the target port '%3%'.
The Application Supports the following card types:
%4%

Application does not support plugins of type '%1%' The Application supports the following plugin types:
%2%
Cannot find plugin information for plugin of type '%1%'.
status.description: General plugin run time inforamtion could not be found for a particular plugin type. This is usually because the requested plugin type does not exist or is not available on the current aptixia installation.

status.text: The Plugin '%1%' has stack ancestor elements that are of an improper type or were improperly constructed.
status.description: The Plugin has stack ancestor elements that are of an improper type or were improperly constructed. This may be because some of the ancestor stack elements of this stack element were constructed with an improper parent objects.

status.text: IP addresses cannot be resolved in the specified amount of time. Please increase the timeout value and check the status of the DHCP server. %1% dhcp clients were able to get IP addresses
status.description: IP addresses cannot be resolved in the specified amount of time

status.text: Unable to renew lease for on a configured interface
status.description: Lease for an IP address cannot be renewed

status.text: One of the required protocols is not supported for atleast one of the selected ports
status.description: Most likely the test is trying to run DHCPv6 on a Chassis with an older version of IxOS. DHCPv6 is supported from 4.10 onwards

status.text: Dhcp does not works above Emulated Router
status.description: Dhcp does not works above Emulated Router

status.text: Multiple instances of '%1%' Global Plugins are not allowed in a port group
An Operation that requires a Global stack element plugin was attempted using an object of type '%1%'.
status.description: One common occurence of this error is when trying to add a non global plugin to a port group's global plugin list.

status.text: Impairment plugin was not able to apply impairment %1%. %2%
status.description: Impairment plugin module in the interface manager threw an exception.

status.text: There has to be only one layer above %1%
status.description: Impairment plugin requires a layer stacked above which generates IP addresses

status.text: Jitter must be lower than delay.
status.description: Jitter must be lower than delay when latancy is enabled.

status.text: For plugin %1% too many elements for Name Server list: %2%. Maximum number of elements allowed for Name Server list is 3
For plugin %1% too many elements for Search list: %2%. Maximum number of elements allowed for Search list is 6
For plugin %1% total 256 characters from the maximum 6 entry Search list excedded:%2%
For EmulatedRouter %1% verification failed for %2% with the following msg: %3%
status.description: Verification error in emulated router plugin

status.text: Destination for %1% does not meet Mask specification
Attempted to set Illegal value '%1%' for InternalStackElementId
